review_scope: Independent read-only QA acceptance for player-facing topology client recovery.
Check allowed and forbidden paths, tests, screenshot evidence, anti-grid/lattice proof, and no product/architecture scope drift.
Confirm District 1 obligation path, route preview/reason copy, and map/task/inspector synchronization did not regress.
requested_action: Return ACCEPT, REQUEST_CHANGES, or BLOCKED. If ACCEPT, route to lead_orchestrator for integration gates.
